headings: July 1st. Weekend in the Peak District
pages.text:
July 1st. Weekend in the __Peak District__
We all slept in the van at Hopping Farm.
Used chemical loo for the first time. It worked well.
	Walk into Alport, (pretty, running water, trout, damp,) + Youlgreave.  Well-dressing last week, but didn't see any.
	Checked on bike-hire for a later trip cycling along Tissington Trail.
	Haddon Hall (mediaeval) closed, alas.
__Chatsworth__
	Glorious Capability Brown landscape.
Paxton was head gardener.
	Cascades. Large pebbles from Eastbourne for [mas] mosaic snake set in pavement.
